title: modelSetAnimFrame2WithChrStuff seeds root-motion flag from unk02 (offset 2) instead of retail unk01 (offset 1)
repro: Compare ASM 7F0702EC (lb 1(v0)) and 7F06FC20 setter (sb t0,1(s0) = unk01=1 in modelSetAnimation2) against C save_unk01 read in modelSetAnimFrame2WithChrStuff

evidence.path: src/game/model.c ASM 7F0702EC lb t7,1(v0) stores rwdata+1 (unk01) into save_unk01 (sp+0x94); C model.c:7573 reads rwdata->unk02 (offset 2)
src/game/model.c:7573 reads rwdata->unk02 (offset 2); ASM 7F0702EC reads offset 1.

src/game/model.c:7573 ASM 7F0702EC lb 1(v0) stored to sp+0x94==save_unk01; flag written to unk01 (offset 1) by modelSetAnimation2 (6608/6635). unk02 is a separate live flag (6435/7859/7882/7902/14327).

src/game/model.c:7573 reads rwdata->unk01 (default-ON). A/B: opt-out reproduces all 7 prior tape hashes byte-identically (tools/fidelity/tape_regression.sh) -> change isolated. Fix-ON re-baselined 5/7 tapes (character root-motion restored per retail); regression green fix-ON and fix-OFF.

history.evidence: src/game/model.c ASM 7F0702EC lb t7,1(v0) stores rwdata+1 (unk01) into save_unk01 (sp+0x94); C model.c:7573 reads rwdata->unk02 (offset 2)
history.note: Root-motion accumulator flag divergence found during ASM audit batch 20 rank 241. Retail modelSetAnimFrame2WithChrStuff seeds its per-loop save_unk01 gate from rwdata->unk01 (struct modeldata_root byte offset 1, bondtypes.h:1480) via lb 1(v0) at VRAM 7F0702EC. The port reads rwdata->unk02 (byte offset 2) with an author comment mistakenly correcting the decomp. modelSetAnimation2 (rank 248) writes unk01=1 at offset 1 (ASM sb t0,1(s0) at 7F06FC20), so the setter and reader are meant to share offset 1; the port reader uses the wrong byte, so the first stepping-loop iteration mis-decides whether to sample root motion via sub_GAME_7F06D3F4 or reuse cached unk24 whenever unk01 and unk02 differ. Affects character root-motion accumulation on animation transitions. anim2 offset-2 accesses in the same function correctly match retail sb/lb 2(s0).

history.evidence: src/game/model.c:7573 reads rwdata->unk02 (offset 2); ASM 7F0702EC reads offset 1.

src/game/model.c:7573 ASM 7F0702EC lb 1(v0) stored to sp+0x94==save_unk01; flag written to unk01 (offset 1) by modelSetAnimation2 (6608/6635). unk02 is a separate live flag (6435/7859/7882/7902/14327).

src/game/model.c:7573 reads rwdata->unk01 (default-ON). A/B: opt-out reproduces all 7 prior tape hashes byte-identically (tools/fidelity/tape_regression.sh) -> change isolated. Fix-ON re-baselined 5/7 tapes (character root-motion restored per retail); regression green fix-ON and fix-OFF.
